member.summary: OAuth2 client secret. Sensitive value is masked by API responses.

member.summary: HMAC signature configuration for outbound webhooks.

member.summary: Defines a generic repository contract for MongoDB-backed entities.

member.summary: Retrieves an entity by identifier.
member.returns: The matched entity, or null when not found.

member.summary: Finds entities matching a predicate.

member.summary: Executes a filtered paged query and returns items and total count.

member.summary: Finds the first entity matching a predicate or null if no match exists.

member.summary: Retrieves all entities from the collection.

member.summary: Adds a new entity.

member.summary: Updates an existing entity.

member.summary: Deletes an entity by identifier.

member.name: T:HookBridge.Application.Interfaces.Services.ITenantService
member.summary: Tenant business operations.

member.name: M:HookBridge.Application.Validation.Events.EventIngestionRequestDtoValidator.EventTypeRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [-.0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the EventTypeRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EventTypeRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_60FF03FEFFFF87FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-.0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
